title: Contact the Information Centre
text:
Service interruption

 Our telephone services will be unavailable until further notice. We are continuing to serve Canadians and encourage you to submit your questions, complaints, notifications and requests via email and online forms .

 -->

 Your questions and comments are important to us and we will address them as quickly as possible!

 If you cannot find the answer to your question on any of the pages referred to above, please contact the Bureau through one of the methods listed below.

 The Information Centre is the primary point of entry for requests from members of the public.

 Follow:

 Twitter 
 Facebook 
 LinkedIn 
 YouTube

 Form

 For general enquiries: 

 To request information, please use the question form.

 Business Hours*: Monday to Friday, 8:00 a.m. to: 4:00 p.m. (Eastern Time), and is closed between 12:00-1:00 p.m.

 The Competition Bureau has regional offices located in Montreal, Toronto and Vancouver.

 *Our offices are closed on the following statutory holidays:

 New Year's Day 
 Good Friday 
 Easter Monday 
 Victoria Day 
 St. John the Baptist Day 
 Canada Day 
 Labour Day 
 National Day for Truth and Reconciliation 
 Thanksgiving Day 
 Remembrance Day 
 Christmas Day 
 Boxing Day
